summary: Iteration 24: Signal Strength Adaptive Anomaly Detection - All tests passed. Backend: 21/21 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified. Signal anomaly detection is working correctly with DEV-002 showing an active anomaly (score=50, observed=-90 dBm vs expected -61.25 dBm, 2σ deviation sustained 10 min).

backend.test_device_anomalies_returns_200: PASS - Operator can access device-anomalies endpoint
backend.test_signal_anomaly_reason_json_structur: PASS - reason_json has: type, expected_mean, lower_band, observed_mean, sustain_minutes, sigma_deviation, readings_count
backend.test_signal_baselines_exist: PASS - Signal baselines exist with metric='signal_strength'
backend.test_signal_baseline_window_is_1440_minu: PASS - Signal baselines use 24-hour (1440 min) window
backend.test_default_excludes_simulated: PASS - is_simulated=False for all anomalies by default

frontend.device_health_page_loads: PASS - Page loads with device table
frontend.device_table_displays_9_devices: PASS - All devices displayed with correct fields
frontend.battery_anomaly_section_visible: PASS - Battery Anomaly Intelligence section displays
frontend.battery_stable_banner: PASS - Green banner shows 'All devices within normal battery behavior. 6 baselines active.'
frontend.signal_anomaly_section_visible: PASS - Signal Strength Anomaly Intelligence section displays
frontend.signal_section_has_wifi_icon: PASS - Wifi icon visible in section title
frontend.active_signal_anomaly_displayed: PASS - DEV-002 anomaly card shows score=50
frontend.signal_anomaly_details: PASS - Shows 'Signal -90.0 dBm vs expected -61.3 dBm | 2.0σ deviation sustained 10 min'
frontend.signal_baselines_display: PASS - 2 signal strength baselines shown (DEV-001, DEV-002)

critical_code_review_comments: Signal anomaly detection correctly implements sustained deviation logic: ALL readings in last 10 min must be below lower_band AND count >= 2
Score calculation correctly implements: deviation_sigma × 25, clamped 0-100
Signal baselines correctly use 24-hour (1440 min) rolling window
API correctly returns reason_json with all required fields: type, expected_mean, lower_band, observed_mean, sustain_minutes, sigma_deviation, readings_count
RBAC correctly enforces operator/admin only access on /api/operator/* endpoints
Heartbeat seeder correctly supports signal_strength metric and triggers baseline computation
UI correctly displays separate Battery and Signal anomaly intelligence sections
Signal anomaly card correctly shows score, device name, observed vs expected dBm, and sigma deviation
seed_data_creation: Used existing signal anomaly data. DEV-002 has active signal anomaly at -90 dBm (below lower_band of -75.62). Signal baselines exist for DEV-001 and DEV-002.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Signal Strength Adaptive Anomaly Detection feature fully tested. Key implementation: (1) _detect_signal_anomalies in baseline_scheduler.py detects sustained signal degradation, (2) Score = sigma_deviation × 25, (3) 10-min cooldown between anomalies, (4) UI shows Signal Strength Anomaly Intelligence section with Wifi icon in Device Health page at /operator/device-health. DEV-002 currently has an active signal anomaly.
